title: 4 High-Yield Stocks for Dividend Investors
text: PPL Corp, Duke Energy Corp, Novartis AG and Carlyle Group Inc. are topping the U.S. market average in terms of dividend yields.

title: PPL Corporation (PPL) CEO Vince Sorgi on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Ludwig - Vice President, Investor Relations Vince Sorgi - President and Chief Executive Officer Joe Bergstein - Chief Financial Officer Greg Dudkin - Chief Operating Officer Conference Call Participants Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Ryan Greenwald - Bank of America Michael Lapides - Goldman Sachs Gregg Orrill - UBS Operator Good morning and welcome to the PPL Corporation's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Please note this event is being recorded.

title: PPL Q2 Earnings and Revenues Outperform Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: PPL's second-quarter earnings beat estimates. PPL benefits from the improved results of the Kentucky and Pennsylvania Regulated segments.
